daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. The cosmos is basically giving you permission to take up space and be unapologetically yourself. Channel that expansive Sag energy into whatever's calling your attention.
daily.love: Someone's picking up on your frequency today. Whether you're coupled or solo, there's genuine connection brewing. Let yourself be a little vulnerable—it's honestly your superpower right now.
daily.career: Your ideas have legs today. Trust that instinct telling you to speak up or pivot something. The universe is rewarding your authenticity more than your hustle, so lead with your unique perspective.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Dancing, walking, stretching—whatever makes you feel alive. Also hydrate like your life depends on it; your energy needs that reset.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about authenticity, Sag. The cosmos is nudging you to show up as your real self, even when it's messy. Trust the unfolding—magic happens when you stop performing.
weekly.love: Someone's noticing your vibe shift. Whether you're single or coupled up, this is a moment to be vulnerable without overthinking it. Real connection thrives on honest words, not perfect ones.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are worth listening to rn. Don't wait for permission to pitch that idea or take a different approach. The energy supports bold moves grounded in genuine passion, not ego.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for presence, not perfection. Move in ways that feel good, rest without guilt, and pay attention to what actually energizes you versus what you think should. That's the real wellness.
